questions: Is any part of #239 already shipped?
What is the correct cycle boundary within the issue's three phases?
What failure semantics make the merge deterministic under concurrency?

findings.summary: no spec surfaces exist corpus-wide; plan.schema.json has no spec_deltas; no PR references #239
audit.schema.json:40 specification-drift category is live -- Phase B routes into it without schema change
governance_index unregistered scan covers root+docs only (governance_index.py:54-63); spec-grammar.md reference needs no registration; non-doctrine name preserves the README inventory lock
merge determinism hinges on heading-keyed whole-block replace; absent MODIFIED/REMOVED targets and duplicate ADDED must be loud errors
Phase B/C deferral grounds: seal-gate timing, qor-audit ~1.3 KB headroom, substantiate schema change, qa_evidence coverage-pillar mapping
